name: Lagos Central Growth Group
description: A vibrant group focused on deep Bible study and intercessory prayer. We meet weekly to grow together in faith and support one another. Our group is committed to studying God's Word systematically, sharing testimonies, and lifting each other up in prayer. We believe in the power of community and the importance of spiritual accountability.

leaderDetails.name: Pastor Sarah Johnson
leaderDetails.bio: Pastor Sarah has been leading growth groups for over 8 years and has a passion for helping people grow in their faith. She holds a Master's degree in Theology and has extensive experience in pastoral care and discipleship. Sarah believes in creating an environment where everyone feels valued and can grow spiritually.

name: Abuja Government Workers Group
description: Supporting government workers in their faith journey while addressing unique challenges in public service. We provide a safe space for civil servants to discuss faith, work-life balance, and ethical decision-making in government.

leaderDetails.name: Pastor Michael Brown
leaderDetails.bio: Pastor Michael has over 15 years of experience in ministry and specializes in workplace ministry. He understands the unique challenges faced by government workers and helps them integrate their faith with their professional responsibilities.

name: Port Harcourt Reconciliation Group
description: Working towards reconciliation and unity in our diverse community through faith-based initiatives and dialogue. We focus on healing divisions, promoting understanding, and building bridges between different ethnic and religious groups.

leaderDetails.name: Pastor Emily Davis
leaderDetails.bio: Pastor Emily is a certified mediator and peace advocate with a heart for reconciliation. She has worked extensively in conflict resolution and community building across different ethnic groups in Nigeria.

name: Kano Cultural Bridge Group
description: Building bridges between different cultures and faiths while sharing the love of Christ. We promote cultural understanding, respect for diversity, and peaceful coexistence through educational programs and cultural exchanges.

leaderDetails.name: Pastor David Wilson
leaderDetails.bio: Pastor David has lived in Kano for over 20 years and has deep understanding of the local culture and traditions. He is passionate about building bridges between different faith communities.

name: Lagos West Family Group
description: Supporting families in their spiritual journey with practical guidance on marriage, parenting, and family relationships. We provide biblical wisdom and practical tools for building strong, healthy families.

leaderDetails.name: Grace Okechukwu
leaderDetails.bio: Grace is a certified family counselor with over 10 years of experience in family ministry. She is married with three children and has a passion for helping families grow stronger together.

name: Enugu Youth Empowerment Group
description: Empowering young people to discover their purpose and develop leadership skills through faith-based mentoring. We focus on character development, skill building, and preparing youth for future leadership roles.

leaderDetails.name: Daniel Adebayo
leaderDetails.bio: Daniel is a youth ministry specialist with a background in education and leadership development. He has successfully mentored hundreds of young people and helped them discover their God-given potential.

name: Kaduna Prayer Warriors
description: A dedicated group focused on intercessory prayer, spiritual warfare, and revival. We believe in the power of prayer to transform lives, communities, and nations.

leaderDetails.name: Pastor Faith Okonkwo
leaderDetails.bio: Pastor Faith has a powerful prayer ministry and has led prayer revivals across Nigeria. She is known for her deep spiritual insight and ability to lead others into powerful prayer experiences.

name: Ibadan Business Leaders Fellowship
description: Connecting Christian business leaders to grow in faith while building successful, ethical businesses. We discuss business challenges, share success stories, and explore how to run businesses according to biblical principles.

leaderDetails.name: Dr. James Adebayo
leaderDetails.bio: Dr. James is a successful entrepreneur and business consultant with a PhD in Business Administration. He has built several successful companies and is passionate about helping other business leaders succeed with integrity.

name: Calabar Women of Excellence
description: Empowering women to excel in all areas of life through faith, education, and support. We focus on personal development, spiritual growth, and helping women reach their full potential.

leaderDetails.name: Pastor Sarah Ekanem
leaderDetails.bio: Pastor Sarah is a women's ministry leader with over 12 years of experience. She has helped hundreds of women discover their worth and purpose through faith-based programs and mentoring.

name: Jos Young Professionals Network
description: Connecting young professionals to grow in faith while advancing their careers. We provide networking opportunities, career guidance, and spiritual support for young working adults.

leaderDetails.name: Emmanuel Dung
leaderDetails.bio: Emmanuel is a career coach and professional development consultant. He has helped many young professionals navigate their careers while maintaining strong faith values.
